title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You’re a designer in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan. You’ve created fonts, templates, or presets. But PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad won’t let you sell. Your bank account is flagged. KYC requirements lock you out. Crypto is your only option—but how do you accept payments without confusing buyers or breaking the law? This post breaks down the exact tools and steps to sell design assets globally using crypto payments. No subscriptions. No middlemen. Just direct sales with automated delivery.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling design assets with crypto payments means accepting Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, or 300+ other coins directly from buyers. No payment processor account required. No buyer KYC needed. The system automates delivery—once payment hits your wallet, the font, template, or preset is sent instantly. This matters because it bypasses geographic and banking restrictions. Creators in restricted countries can sell globally without intermediaries. Crypto pricing is converted to USD at transaction time, so you’re protected from volatility. It’s a one-time setup for lifetime access to a global market.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The system uses a crypto payment gateway (like NOWPayments) to generate payment links or QR codes for each product. Buyers scan the code or click the link, send crypto from their wallet, and the transaction is verified on-chain. Once confirmed, the backend triggers automated delivery of the digital file. No manual intervention. No waiting. The frontend integrates a wallet connect feature, allowing buyers to pay directly from their MetaMask, Trust Wallet, or any supported wallet. Multi-chain support means buyers can pay with their preferred coin, and live price feeds ensure accurate USD conversion at checkout.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This is built for designers in countries where PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are blocked. If you’re selling fonts, templates, presets, or other design assets but can’t collect payment, this is your solution. It’s also for solo developers building crypto-native stores. The system requires no technical expertise—just a wallet and a product to sell. It’s designed to be plug-and-play, with one-time payments and lifetime access. No recurring fees. No revenue sharing. You keep 100% of what you earn, minus a small transaction fee for the payment gateway.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The core components are a crypto payment gateway, automated delivery system, and frontend wallet integration. The gateway handles transaction verification and USD conversion. The delivery system ensures files are sent instantly after payment. The wallet integration lets buyers pay directly from their crypto wallets. Together, these components create a seamless, global sales pipeline. Add an admin dashboard for transaction logs and order management, and you’ve got full control over your store. Each component is modular—use what you need, skip what you don’t.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Start by setting up a crypto wallet if you don’t already have one. Choose a payment gateway like NOWPayments that supports 300+ coins and requires no KYC. Integrate the gateway with your store using tools like Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) for frontend wallet integration. Upload your design assets to a secure server or cloud storage. Configure automated delivery so files are sent instantly after payment. Test the system with a small transaction. Once live, promote your store to your audience. The first sale proves the system works—scale from there.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

To sell an ebook online without PayPal, use a crypto payment gateway like NOWPayments. Set up a payment link or QR code for your ebook. Share it with buyers. Once they send crypto, the gateway verifies the transaction and triggers automated delivery of the ebook. No PayPal account required. No buyer KYC needed. You keep 100% of the sale, minus a small transaction fee. This method works globally, even in countries where PayPal is blocked.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.

If you’re selling Notion templates for Bitcoin or building a crypto-only digital download store, the same principles apply. Use Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) to let buyers pay with BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300+ coins. The frontend integration generates multi-chain QR codes and provides live price feeds for accurate USD conversion. Start by setting up your store at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html and follow the deployment guide to go live in minutes.
Your Action Checklist

Set up a crypto wallet to receive payments. Choose a payment gateway like NOWPayments that supports 300+ coins and requires no KYC. Integrate the gateway with your store using Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) for frontend wallet integration. Upload your design assets to secure cloud storage. Configure automated delivery to send files instantly after payment. Test the system with a small transaction. Promote your store to your audience. Track sales and transactions through an admin dashboard. Scale by adding more products or expanding your marketing. Keep 100% of what you earn, minus transaction fees.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
